note: This manifest is written after the local regeneration gate has passed. It hashes inputs and generated evidence files, but intentionally omits reports/metr_style_report.md and reports/evidence_appendix.md to avoid self-referential report hashes. The validation-manifest audit is generated after this manifest and is checked by requirement coverage rather than hashed by the manifest. Git status is captured before the final commit, so a dirty status can reflect the in-progress report commit rather than a validation failure.
